query:
SELECT stationCode, active, COUNT(*) AS configCount
FROM productivity_target_configs
WHERE stationCode = 'D'
GROUP BY stationCode, active;

SELECT se.id AS stationEventId, se.businessDate, se.operatorUserId, u.name, u.username, se.productId, se.categoryId, se.subtypeCode, p.importedCategoryName, p.importedBrandName, p.productName, p.batchNo, se.countForProductivity
FROM station_events se
LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = se.operatorUserId
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
WHERE se.stationCode = 'D'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete'
  AND DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY se.businessDate DESC, se.id DESC;
